form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Newcastle All Weather December 20 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Straight Ahead carrying 59.5kg at $2.40. Previously first up; fifth of 11 at Lingfield All Weather September 13 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Romeo Montague carrying 60.5kg at $4.30. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 46 days. Resuming tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on February 4 over 1200m, neck behind Champonie with 55.5kg at $1.90. Last start won by a head at this track February 24 over 1000m defeating Skip To Victory with 56kg at $2.80. Found winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 4th of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 4 over 1200m, 2 len behind Alasrae with 60kg at $34. Second run from a spell 4th of 8 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Layla Liz with 56.5kg at $6.50. Looks tested without further improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run inside the final furlong.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation won by a neck at this track January 23 over 1000m defeating Baker Blue carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. First up last campaign 4th of 7 at Nottingham on June 1 over 1000m, 4 len behind Ameeq carrying 60.5kg at $23. Can return with a bold run.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Hamilton Park September 22 over 1000m, soft track; 5 len behind Dandy Style carrying 60.5kg at $8.50. At his first start won by 1.0 len Pontefract April 14 over 1000m defeating Saucy Jane with 59.5kg at $8.50. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation third of 10 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, in the wet; 1.3 len behind The Resdev Scholar carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. On debut second of 9 at Salisbury May 24 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Ardisia with 59kg at $19. Deserves plenty of thought.
